project_name: GovBond — Municipal Bond Tokenization on Initia
description: Tokenized Indonesian municipal bonds (obligasi daerah) on Initia EVM appchain. Implements ERC-3643 (T-REX) KYC-gated security tokens and ERC-7540 async vault for compliant bond subscription, coupon distribution, and redemption. Settlement in IDRP (Indonesian Rupiah stablecoin, 2 decimals). Reference deployment: Palembang Municipal Bond 2025 (PMB25).
notes: Port from Arbitrum Sepolia. All contracts unchanged except network config. Frontend updated with InterwovenKit wallet integration and Interwoven Bridge panel.
